title: Unique Paths
hints: Notice that reaching any cell depends only on the cells immediately above and to its left. This suggests a dynamic programming approach.
Define a 2D array where each entry stores the number of paths to that cell. The value at (i, j) is the sum of values from (i-1, j) and (i, j-1).
Initialize the first row and first column with 1s, since there is only one way to reach any cell in those edges. Then fill the rest using the recurrence.
